commit.message:
fix: final quality gate — 15 issues fixed from comprehensive audit

CRITICAL:
- Stripe webhook: removed supabase client shadowing in switch cases

HIGH:
- Team plan limits: reads from profiles.plan instead of non-existent workspaces.plan
- Integration config: key whitelist + size limit validation
- Encryption: production guard throws if ENCRYPTION_KEY missing
- Settings: API key encryption order fixed (no plaintext in spread)
- Agents: linked_folders items validated (type, length, no traversal)

MEDIUM:
- UUID validation on conversations/messages and chat routes
- Onboarding use cases: French → English keys
- Register: workspace creation failure returns 500
- Settings: LLM provider validated against allowlist

LOW:
- Welcome email: shield → zap emoji
- Documents pagination: 500 → 100

commit.message:
fix: route protection, admin redirect, plan prices, portfolio upload errors

- middleware: redirect ADMIN from /dashboard → /admin/dashboard after login
- dashboard: fetch /api/dashboard/stats checks r.ok before setStats (prevents crash on 401)
- ErrorBoundary: "Retour" button → / instead of /dashboard (avoids crash loop)
- seed: fix plan prices Standard 500000→5000 FCFA, Pro 1000000→10000 FCFA
- DB: UPDATE subscription_plans prices to correct values (5000/10000/20000)
- storage: throw STORAGE_NOT_CONFIGURED in production without R2 instead of crashing
- portfolio API: return 503 with clear message when R2 not configured
- portfolio UI: display helpful message for STORAGE_NOT_CONFIGURED error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: wrap file upload in try/catch to prevent stuck uploading state

If /api/upload returns non-JSON (e.g. Render 500 HTML error), res.json()
would throw and uploading/uploadingIdx state would stay true forever,
permanently disabling the upload button. Fixed in cart, academy, and admin
store pages using finally block to guarantee state is reset.

Move docker-compose into OS repo, rename image to lore-os-memory

in the repo and setup.mjs copies it to ~/.lore/ instead of generating it
inline. Image renamed from lorehq/lore-memory to lorehq/lore-os-memory.

commit.message:
Fix impingement plate 3D viewer framing

The impingement plate geometry was offset at vesselR from the origin but
the camera target was [0,0,0], making the plates barely visible. Center
the group so the plate assembly sits at the origin, and scale the camera
distance to the plate dimensions instead of the full vessel radius.

Defer URL tab routing while splash modal is open

Charts rendered behind the splash modal get broken layout. Instead of
trying to fix rendering after the fact, defer the tab switch: store
the pathname while splash is open, apply it when splash closes. Chart
callbacks never fire into a hidden container.

opus-2026-03-08-S50: THM-103 writeup + cocycle restriction/kernel analysis

THM-103 (β₁≤1) formal proof written up.
Key finding: res_v is injective on Z¹(T) and surjective onto Z¹(T\v).
Bad vs good distinction is entirely about B¹ rank.

commit.message:
fix: prioritise no-score entries + extract IMDb IDs in MDBList enrichment

Entries with no scores at all (OMDb failed) get enriched first since
MDBList provides IMDb + RT + Popcorn in one call. Also extracts IMDb
ID from MDBList response when missing. This means MDBList effectively
backfills what OMDb couldn't provide (keys often exhausted from
client-side usage before the nightly workflow runs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: adj-twhj atomic tmux paste-buffer replaces racy send-keys

Replace two-step send-keys -l + send-keys Enter with atomic set-buffer +
paste-buffer. The buffer includes a trailing newline which acts as Enter,
eliminating the race condition where Enter arrives before the text paste
completes. This is a fundamentally different approach from the 50ms delay
attempted in adj-53kf.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove alembic from Dockerfile CMD — restore working startup

The original working Dockerfile had:
  CMD ["uvicorn", "app.main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"]

Commit 1bc49ef introduced "alembic upgrade head &&" which blocked uvicorn
when alembic failed.  The follow-up fix (bcdda1b) changed && to ; but
alembic was still hanging (likely DB lock or connection timeout from the
previous failed run), preventing uvicorn from ever starting → 502.

This commit removes alembic from CMD entirely, restoring the original
working startup.  Migrations should be run manually when needed.

The Article model fix (removing title_zh/ai_summary_zh ORM columns) and
the raw-SQL translate endpoint from bcdda1b remain in place and are correct.

commit.message:
fix: 移除 composingRef 门控，彻底解决所有输入框中文输入死锁问题

错误根因：onChange 门控（if !composingRef.current）导致死锁——
当 compositionStart 触发后组件被重渲染，compositionEnd 未触发，
composingRef 永久卡在 true，之后所有 onChange 都被屏蔽，
英文数字也无法输入。

正确修复策略：
- 彻底删除 composingRef 和所有 onChange 门控
- 真正解决中文输入的关键是上一次提交：将 Field/ExpiryField/Section
  从 JSX 组件调用改为直接函数调用，防止 React 在 setEditVal 时
  卸载重挂 input 元素，IME 合成不再中断
- onKeyDown 的 e.nativeEvent.isComposing 检查保留（防止 Enter 误提交）
- 所有输入框恢复最简洁的原始 onChange/onBlur 写法

commit.message:
Fix PART1 test set: use 5000 non-overlapping samples instead of full 2.2M

Training used shuffle(seed=42)[0:10000], val [10000:10500], so we use
[11000:16000] as the evaluation test set to avoid data leakage.

commit.message:
Format timestamps as EST and flag notification emails as high priority

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix main.gs: pass priorHistory through to generateBaseline

processTask() was not extracting priorHistory from the incoming task
object and not passing it to generateBaseline(). This meant the MCMC
Bayesian baseline path in coordinator.gs was never reached from the
GAS backend — Reference Class Data had no effect on the displayed
probability or distribution curves.

Fix: destructure priorHistory from task, validate, and forward to
generateBaseline() so the Student-t MH-MCMC path activates when
the user has entered reference class data. All downstream calculations
(metrics, P(X<=tau), optimization) now operate on the correctly
shifted baseline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: move קבלת סחורה into הכנסת מלאי as third entry mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

#126: Resolve runtime class references to their default interface

When a method signature references a WinRT runtime class (e.g., PointerPoint),
resolve it to the class's default interface (IPointerPoint) for ABI compatibility.
The emitted class struct delegates to its interface's VTable, so return types must
reference the interface name to avoid undefined symbol errors.

Also emit companion WinMD interfaces in the dependency closure - previously only
struct/enum/delegate/class types were emitted from companions, causing missing
interface definitions when a class references its interface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(medellin): filtrar flex self_service por cutoff en vez de order_date

El filtro anterior (order_date >= medianoche Bogotá) excluía órdenes
colocadas entre las 7 PM y medianoche Bogotá (UTC-5) cuyo UTC timestamp
cae en el día siguiente antes de las 05:00 UTC. Ahora usa cutoff === hoy,
consistente con cross_docking y Bulevar. Fallback sin cutoff mantiene
el filtro de order_date.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve Stripe checkout 500 by auto-creating users in requireAuth

Root cause: users table was empty because both Clerk webhook and
backup sync failed — webhook used process.env (broken on CF Workers),
and pricing page never called /api/users/me.

Changes:
- requireAuth() now auto-creates D1 user via SYNC-001 when Clerk
  session exists but D1 record is missing
- Clerk webhook uses getCloudflareContext() instead of process.env
- CLERK_WEBHOOK_SECRET added to Cloudflare secrets
